title: Chinese Buddhist: Wudeng Huiyuan (Five Lamps) (4)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Wudeng Huiyuan (Five Lamps)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Wudeng Huiyuan (Five Lamps)

translation.text: From Wudeng Huiyuan (Five Lamps): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
